Giuseppe Maria Crespi

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Study for plate 4 of Bertoldo, Bertoldino, e Cacasenno (recto); Fragmentary Copy (verso)
by Giuseppe Maria Crespi
Italy · 1700–1715 · Red chalk (recto and verso) on ivory laid paper
Portrait of Dr. Broussais
by Giuseppe Maria Crespi
Italy · 1817 · Lithograph in black on cream wove paper
